description: Auto-emit one Dagster asset per top-level Stripe resource (customers / charges / subscriptions / invoices / payment_intents / etc.). Materializing runs a paginated List call against api.stripe.com/v1/{resource}.

api_key_env_var.label: API Key Env Var
api_key_env_var.description: Env var with the Stripe secret key (sk_test_* / sk_live_*).

resource_selector.label: Resource Selector
resource_selector.description: Fivetran-shape selector filtering which resources become assets.
